title: Hypixel SkyBlock Gadget Library
description: A library mod for my hsg (Hypixel SkyBlock Gadget) series.
body: This is a library mod for hsg(Hypixel SkyBlock Gadget)series providing utilities mainly for GUI. There are buttons, switch buttons, number sliders and color sliders. Also, there is a custom keybind class for other mods to use which has a provided key category of "key.category.hsg.general".
